goal: Add search/filter bar to StapleChecklist component for quickly finding staples

steps.name: Filter checklist staples by name with search bar
steps.description: Add TextInput search bar to StapleChecklist. Implement filterStaples pure function for case-insensitive substring matching. Add clear button. Wire filtering into render pipeline.
acceptance_criteria: Search input visible at top of checklist in checklist mode
Typing filters staple list in real-time by name (case-insensitive substring)
Filtered results preserve checked/unchecked visual state
Tapping a staple in filtered results toggles it on/off trip
Clear button (X) appears when search has text and clears filter on tap
Clear button hidden when search input is empty
quality_gates: All 8 walking skeleton acceptance tests pass

steps.name: Empty state message when no staples match search
steps.description: When the search filter produces zero results, display 'No staples match {query}' message. Message disappears when query is corrected or cleared.
acceptance_criteria: When filter produces zero results, message "No staples match '{query}'" is displayed
Message disappears when query is modified to produce results
Message disappears when search is cleared
